titleStmt.title: SII 26.199: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 199. (A.R. No. 187 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is slightly damaged and is incomplete at the end. It records a gift of 12 kalam of paddy from the 4th day of the month of Āṉi in the year quoted above, to provide for food offerings to the deity Sundaranāyanār at Teṉpaḷḷi, by the ūr and the ūrāḷis of the village of Pāppārapūṇḍi alias Vīrarājēndranallūr a dēvadāna of the deity Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyār. It is stated that these people would deliver the paddy to the śrī-bhaṇḍāra of the temple of Avināśiyāḷuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, annually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . virapāṇṭiyate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu Uṭaiyā
r Avināciyāḷuṭaiya nāyaṉā
r śrīpaṇṭārattāṟku Innāya
ṉār tevatāṉam pāppārapūṇ
ṭiyāṉa virarācentiranallūr
Ūrum Ūrāḷikaḷom teṉpa
ḷḷiyil cuntaranāyaṟku nāṅ
kaḷ Ivvāṭṭai Āṉi māta
mirupattu nālāntiyati muta
l koṅkāl nāḷoṉṟu
kku Ivaṟkku Amutupaṭikku koṅkā
l Arici nāḻikkum kaṟiyamutu viñca
ṉa muṭpaṭa Āṇṭoṉṟukku karaṇa
ttāl nellu paṉṉirukalamum Eṭu
ttivantu Āṇṭutoṟum śrīpaṇṭā
ratte Aḷantu kuṭuppomākavum Ip
paṭikku cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka
Uṭaiyār Aviṉāciyāḷuṭaiya nāya
ṉār tirumuṉpe nirvārttuk kuṭu
ttom pāppārapūṇṭiyāṉa vira
rācentiranallūr Ūrum Ūrā
ḷikaḷom Ippaṭikku Iṭaṅkai
nāya ntampirāṉtoḻaṉāṉa tillai
muva nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku
ccan �nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku A
vināci ttaṉum pūluvan māṇikkan
kaiyile ṉum mivviruvom kaimmāṭ
ṭāmai Ivarkaḷ colla samjñaimā
ṭṭeṟinteṉ Avināciyāḷuṭaiyār
koyilil paṇṇaiceyvār
kaḷil tatan cokka Ālāl
Digital edition of SII 26.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
